## How it was verified

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`) and typecheck is clean (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Stitch-math changes include or update a unit test
- [ ] No new third-party origins (CSP in `index.html` unchanged, or the change
      is justified in the description)
- [ ] New interactive UI is keyboard-reachable with an accessible name
